arts.ttl: PSG Provides Update on Midfielder’s Injury Ahead of Barcelona, Liverpool UCL Clash
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain cruised to a 3-0 win over Stade Brestois in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League knockout play-off last Tuesday at Stade de Roudourou, with Ousmane Dembélé scoring twice. Unless Brest pulls off an unlikely comeback, PSG will face either Barcelona or Liverpool in the Round of 16. arts.ttl: PSG Remain Focused on £60M-Rated Liverpool, Tottenham Target for Summer Move
arts.sum: Last summer, Paris Saint-Germain showed interest in Atalanta forward Ademola Lookman, but a deal never came together. However, a recent report suggests the Ligue 1 club is still keen on signing the Nigerian standout. arts.ttl: How Ousmane Dembélé became the new face of Paris Saint-Germain
arts.sum: It's been a wild season for Ousmane Dembélé, as he's swung from being dropped in October to scoring 18 times in his last 12 games to lead new-look, rebuilt PSG forward.

Juventus forward Dušan Vlahović is one potential target.
